parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
class Team {
  + name: string
  + description: string
  + ownerId: User
  + participants: Participant[]
  + topics: Topic[]
}

class Topic {
  + name: string
  + icon: string
  + isSequential: boolean
  + subtopics: Subtopic[]
}

class Subtopic {
  + name: string
  + description: string
  + challenges: Challenge[]
}

class Challenge {
  + name: string
  + body: string
  + type: ChallengeType
  + selection: string[]
  + correct: string[]
  + points: number
  + feedback: string
}

class ChallengeReport {
  + userId: User
  + challengeId: Challenge
  + answer: string[]
  + answeredCorrectly: boolean
}

class User {
  + name: string
  + email: string
  + educationalInstitution: string
  + educationalBackground: EducationalBackground
  + birthDate: Date
  + points: number
}

class Participant {
  + userId: User
  + points: number
  + status: ParticipantStatus
}

enum ParticipantStatus {
  PENDING
  ACCEPTED
  DISABLED
}

enum EducationalBackground {
  MIDDLE_INCOMPLETE
  MIDDLE_ONGOING
  MIDDLE_COMPLETE
  HIGH_INCOMPLETE
  HIGH_ONGOING
  HIGH_COMPLETE
  GRADUATION_INCOMPLETE
  GRADUATION_ONGOING
  GRADUATION_COMPLETE
}

enum ChallengeType {
  INPUT
  RADIO
  CHECKBOX
}

Team "1" o-- "0..n" Topic
Topic "1" o-- "0..n" Subtopic
Subtopic "1" o-- "0..n" Challenge
ChallengeReport "1" o-- "1" Challenge
ChallengeReport "1" o-- "1" User
Team "1" o-- "1" User
Team "1" o-- "0..n" Participant
Participant "1" o-- "1" User

Participant --> ParticipantStatus : + status
User --> EducationalBackground : + educationalBackground
Challenge --> ChallengeType : + type

@enduml
```
